name: Business Direction
description: Define and direct the corporate and banking asset & liability strategies, goals and policies.  Define the organization structure and manage strategic relationships and corporate commuications. Handle central legal, audit and security activities

name: Corporate Relations
description: Manage strategic corporate relationships and handle all corporate communications/publicity and press announcements

name: Unit Management
description: Define, implement and revise the business unit plan, oversee and administer unit activity and finances and troubleshoot operational issues

name: Corporate Services
description: Provide specialist support and guidance for legal compliance, internal audit and business continuity asssurance

name: Platform Operations
description: Manage new and updated production systems testing, deployment and operations. Provide production support (help desk)

name: Human Resources
description: Handle staff recruitment, training, payrol and benefits administration.  Undertake staff certification and appraisal activities. Oversee staff assignments and administer staff access and entitlements

name: Buildings And Equipment
description: Handle procurement processing, maintain the fixed asset register and oversee all maintenance, security and operations of office equipment, buildings and utilities

name: Solution Development
description: Manage IT standards and development environments. Manage and administer systems development and testing activities, develop and maintain production applications

name: Intelectual Property And Knowledge
description: Define and distribute business architectures, procedures and designs. Maintain and manage the use and leverage of intellectual property assets

name: Channel Management
description: Manage the channel portfolio, assess channel and device use and performance. Manage customer contact centers and services. Track and analyse contact center and channel activity to continually improve performance and procedures and to re-configure/balance services under load. Manage external information provider relations and  oversee cash and non-cash branch network distribution activities

name: Models And Analytics
description: Define and refine analyses and models covering topics including financial markets, customer credit assessments, risk and liquidity insights, fraud detection and customer behavior. Support market asset valuations

name: Product Management
description: Manage and assess the performance of the bank’s products and services. Define and refine product and service designs. Oversee the acceptance and production release of new products and services and maintain the product directory

name: Accounting Services
description: Maintain transaction accounting and financial ledgers. Provide account reconciliation services and run account fraud detection routines. Administer consolidated customer tax positions and maintain rewards points accounts

name: Clearing And Settlement
description: Clear and settle market trades, allocate orders, maintain counterparty and correspondent details. Handle check processing, correspondent bank and ACH interactions and payment fulfillment activities

name: External Agency
description: Manage relations with banks, sub-custodians, correspondent banks, service partners and service providers/agencies. Manage and process 3rd party commissions

name: Operational Services
description: Handle customer billing and payments and accounts receivable. Administer reward point allocation and redemptions. Administer and operate issued and tracked device services (cards, fobs, POS devices etc.)

name: Custody, Collateral And Documents
description: Provide custody services and manage collateral allocation and administration. Handle troubled account recovery. Run document classification and distribution services and archiving

name: Trade Banking
description: Handle the set-up and servicing of trade related products and services including bank guarantees

name: Corporate Finance
description: Handle the set-up, management, offering and delivery activities associated with different investment products such as investment funds and corporate debt/equity issuance (ECM/DCM)

name: Consumer Banking
description: Handle the initial set-up and all subsequent servicing fulfillment requests and scheduled product processing for consumer banking products

name: Loans and Deposits
description: Handle the initial set-up and all subsequent customer servicing/fulfillment  requests and scheduled product processing tasks for loans and deposits

name: Corporate Banking
description: Handle the initial set-up and all subsequent customer servicing/fulfillment requests and scheduled product processing for corporate cash management and trust management products

name: Market Operations
description: Oversee money and capital market trading activity, handle trade confirmation and matching, securities receipt and delivery, trade and price reporting and corporate events

name: Channel Specific
description: Operate voice and data customer networks. Operate branch, ATM  and gateway networks

name: Servicing
description: Administer and operate the contact center and supporting services

name: Market Trading
description: Manage trading book positions, provide quotes and trade in money and capital markets including FX/MM, Equities, Fixed income, Commodities and Derivatives. Support program/ and high frequency trading (HFT)

name: Distribution
description: Handle mail, cash & non-cash branch network distribution services

name: Advisory Services
description: Handle the delivery of specialist financial advisory services for M&A, corporate finance and corporate and consumer tax reporting

name: Cards
description: Handle the initial card product set-up and servicing requests (card authorization and capture). Handle the card network interactions, billing and merchant agreements, liaison and production support activities

name: Cross Channel
description: Operate customer dowloaded application administration, customer contact authentication services, contact routing and channel history tracking capabilities

name: Operational Risk
description: Define and support the adoption of models and mitigation approaches for business operational and production risk

name: Market Risk
description: The set of activities to manage the risk of losses in positions arising from movements in market prices as a result of different aspects of market risk. Types of market risk to be managed are amongst others "Equity risk",  "Intrest Rate Risk", "Currency Risk",  etc. These are called systemic risk, which means that the risk is not related to a specific financial instrument. Typical activities are modeling , measuring, analyzing and metigating  volatility of prices caused by market risk factors.

name: Relationship Management
description: Set-up and maintain legal agreements, develop and implement relationship plans, maintain credit ratings and other behavioral insights and qualifiers

name: Group Treasury
description: Consolidate and analyse the bank’s ‘book of business’. Handle corporate treasury's tactical and strategic funding functions and trigger asset securitization initiatives as necessary

name: Compliance
description: Handle relations and reporting with regulators. Provide regulatory and audit compliance oversight and specialist support internally

name: Information Providers
description: Administer and operate external market information servies. Augment/enhance and distribute the information internally

name: Credit Risk
description: The set of activities that model, measure and mitigate the probability of loss due to a borrower’s failure to make payments on any type of debt.

name: Financial Control
description: Agree and track business unit performance to budget. Oversee financial accounting. Consolidate and report on the bank’s financial statements and tax position. Administer approved suppliers list and handle company billing and payments

name: Party Reference
description: Maintain party (customer, legal entity, broker, etc.)  and location details

name: Sales
description: Drive prospect, customer cross-sell, up-sell and retention campaigns. Match products to customers and process offers

name: Customer Care
description: Handle non-product and cross-product specific requests and issues (cases)

name: Investment Services
description: Provide investment portoflio and E-trading services
